# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## What Changed

- Describe the main code, documentation, or workflow changes.

## Validation

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] Documentation was updated if setup or behavior changed
- [ ] UI changes were checked manually if applicable
- [ ] I ran the live Ollama smoke test when the change affected runtime behavior

## Risks or Follow-up Work

Describe any known limitations, risks, or intentionally deferred work.

## Screenshots or Logs

Add screenshots or terminal output if they help review the change.
